ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Sort(
    Filter(
        tbl_mrl_workorder_log, 
        workorder_no_ref = varSelectedWorkOrder.workorder_no
    ),
    Created,
    SortOrder.Ascending
)

Coalesce(
    Text(varSelectedTask.start_date, "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm AM/PM"), 
    "Not Started Yet"
)
